stemHtml: During an approach where no track guidance is available in a procedure-specified turn, the protection area is (1) _____ and the minimum obstacle clearance (MOC) is provided across (2) _____.

options.a: (1) primary only; (2) the total width of the area
options.b: (1) primary only; (2) the primary and secondary areas
options.c: (1) primary and secondary; (2) the primary area only
options.d: (1) primary and secondary; (2) the total width of the area
